nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 62. Northwest wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 83. Northwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke after 10pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 61. West wind around 5 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Areas Of Smoke then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Areas of smoke before 2pm, then areas of smoke and a chance of rain showers between 2pm and 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. Southwest wind 3 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 69. Southwest wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 79. West wind around 12 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 61. Northwest wind 3 to 8 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 84. West wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 63. South wind around 7 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 84. South wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 67. South wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.
